title.zh: 從零組建 APP 團隊
title.en: Building an APP Team from Scratch

zh: 描述一次從零組建團隊的經驗
你如何帶領 Junior 工程師成長？
en: Tell me about building a team from scratch
How do you mentor junior engineers?

situation.zh: 加入赫斯全球時，公司需要加密貨幣錢包、OTC、GameFi 等產品，但沒有專職 Mobile 團隊。
situation.en: When I joined Hearts Worldwide, the company needed crypto wallets, OTC, and GameFi products but had no dedicated mobile team.

task.zh: 擔任 APP 小組 Leader，從招聘、架構到交付全權負責，讓團隊能持續迭代多個 App。
task.en: As APP squad leader, I owned hiring, architecture, and delivery so the team could iterate on multiple apps.

zh: 定義 React Native 全端架構（App、Web 後台、Server、Smart Contract），讓新成員有明確模組邊界
建立 Code Review 與 API 設計規範，Junior 可照範例擴充功能
必盈錢包：三週內完成雙平台上架，之後維護三年半
Summit：先用 Firestore Serverless API 讓 PM/QA 提前測試，再逐步補完後端
en: Defined React Native full-stack architecture (app, web admin, server, smart contracts) with clear module boundaries
Established code review and API design conventions so juniors could extend features from reference modules
Biying wallet: dual-platform launch in 3 weeks, maintained for 3.5 years
Summit: Firestore serverless API first so PM/QA could test early, then hardened backend

result.zh: 團隊從零成長到可並行維護多個 App；後續 Hinspot 因 App Store 政策改 React Native Web + SSO，展現快速應變能力。（相關 App 現均已下架，經驗侧重架構與交付。）
result.en: Team grew from zero to maintaining multiple apps in parallel; later pivoted Hinspot to RN Web + SSO when App Store policy changed. (Apps since delisted; experience focuses on architecture and delivery.)

zh: 若追問下架原因：誠實說明平台政策與營運因素，強調架構、交付速度、政策應對仍適用產品工程角色
en: If asked about delisting: be honest about store policies and business factors; emphasize architecture, delivery speed, and policy pivots

zh: 描述一次解決重大技術問題的經驗
你如何處理資安或技術債？
en: Tell me about solving a major technical problem
How do you handle security or tech debt?

situation.zh: Cares 2.0 健康數據平台面臨大量中／高風險資安項目，且長時間區間查詢效能不佳。
situation.en: Cares 2.0 health data platform had many medium/high security findings and poor long-range query performance.

task.zh: 在不中斷現有服務的前提下，協助重構、改善資安，並優化資料讀取。
task.en: Remediate security issues and improve data access without disrupting live service.

zh: 設計健康數據摘要資料模型，將長時間區間查詢改為讀取預聚合摘要，解決效能瓶頸
逐項盤點 168 個中／高風險項目，分類優先序，與團隊協作重構與修補
Flutter App 同步維護，確保前端配合新資料模型
en: Designed health data summary model so long-range queries read pre-aggregated summaries instead of raw scans
Triaged 168 medium/high risks by priority and collaborated on refactors and patches
Maintained Flutter app in sync with the new data model

result.zh: 中／高風險資安項目由 168 項降至 12 項（縮減逾 90%）；長時間區間查詢效能明顯改善。專案後續已結束。
result.en: Reduced medium/high security risks from 168 to 12 (>90%); long-range query performance improved significantly. Project has since concluded.

title.zh: 動態表單引擎與團隊帶領

zh: 描述一次架構設計如何降低開發成本
帶領過幾人的團隊？如何分工？
en: Describe architecture that reduced development cost
How large a team have you led? How did you divide work?

situation.zh: 昕力時期多家企業 in-house App（保全、航空、健檢、電信、金融）需依場域動態調整表單，逐案重寫成本高。
situation.en: At ThinkPower, multiple enterprise in-house apps (security, aviation, health, telecom, banking) needed dynamic forms; per-client rebuilds were expensive.

task.zh: 設計可複用的 MVVM 動態表單引擎，並在峰值帶領 7 人團隊交付。
task.en: Design a reusable MVVM dynamic form engine and lead up to 7 engineers at peak.

zh: 以 JSON 驅動表單欄位、驗證、樣式與 API 上傳格式，新案只需配置 JSON
某保全業專案：6 個月、7 人，我負責 SA/SD 與核心引擎，其餘成員負責場域客製
某航空業：動態表單 + 至客戶端 Xamarin iOS 授課 5 天，降低客戶維護成本
en: JSON-driven fields, validation, styling, and API payloads—new projects only needed JSON config
Security industry project: 6 months, 7 people; I owned SA/SD and core engine, others handled domain customization
Aviation project: dynamic forms plus 5-day Xamarin iOS training at client site

result.zh: 多個 in-house 專案共用同一套引擎，大幅縮短新案開發時間；後續接案也沿用此架構。
result.en: Multiple in-house projects shared one engine, cutting new project time; later freelance work reused the same architecture.

title.zh: App Store 政策變更的快速應變
title.en: Pivoting When App Store Policy Changed

zh: 描述一次計畫趕不上變化，你如何應對？
遇到外部限制（政策、時程）怎麼處理？
en: Tell me about when plans changed and how you adapted
How do you handle external constraints like policy or deadlines?

situation.zh: Hinspot GameFi 產品已以 React Native 開發，App Store 政策突然收緊，原上架路徑不可行。
situation.en: Hinspot GameFi was built in React Native when App Store policy tightened and the original release path was blocked.

task.zh: 在有限時間內找到可交付方案，讓用戶仍能使用核心功能。
task.en: Find a shippable alternative so users could still access core features.

zh: 評估 Web、Hybrid、Serverless 過渡等選項，選擇 React Native Web + SSO 作為最快可行路徑
調整登入與金流流程以符合新政策
與 PM 對齊 MVP 範圍，先上線核心功能
en: Evaluated Web, hybrid, and serverless interim options; chose RN Web + SSO as fastest viable path
Adjusted login and payment flows for new policy requirements
Aligned MVP scope with PM to ship core features first

result.zh: 在政策窗口內完成改版上線；團隊累積了政策應對與技術選型經驗。（App 現已下架。）
result.en: Shipped the pivot within the policy window; team gained experience in policy response and tech trade-offs. (App since delisted.)

title.zh: 地端 AI 框架規劃與技術傳承
title.en: Edge AI Framework for Junior Enablement

zh: 如何讓 Junior 工程師快速接手複雜專案？
描述一次 AI 相關的架構決策
en: How do you enable juniors on complex projects?
Describe an architecture decision involving AI

situation.zh: Megaforce 需在地端硬體上提供 AI 即時轉錄與會議摘要，團隊含 Junior 工程師，需可持續擴充。
situation.en: Megaforce needed edge-deployable AI transcription and meeting summaries; the team included juniors and had to scale.

task.zh: 設計可部署於地端電路板的框架，讓 Junior 能依模組範例開發 UI 與業務邏輯。
task.en: Design an edge-deployable framework so juniors could build UI and business logic from reference modules.

zh: 定義 Python Server + Web 地端架構，模組化 API（轉錄、摘要、設定）
撰寫可运行的 API 模組範例與部署文件
與 Junior 分工：我負責框架與核心 API，他們負責 Web UI 與細部邏輯
en: Defined Python server + web edge architecture with modular APIs (transcription, summary, config)
Wrote runnable API module examples and deployment docs
Split work: I owned framework and core APIs; juniors owned web UI and business logic

result.zh: 框架規劃完成，開發進行中；Junior 已能依範例獨立開發子模組。
result.en: Framework planning complete; development in progress; juniors can independently build sub-modules from examples.

title.zh: PetCaresHub 三層商業架構規劃

zh: 描述一次從 0 到 1 的產品規劃
如何設計可擴展的多租戶／連鎖架構？
en: Describe a 0-to-1 product planning experience
How do you design scalable multi-tenant or franchise architecture?

situation.zh: 寵物醫療產品最初是單一「寵物醫院」概念，但客戶實際需要連鎖經營的多層組織。
situation.en: Pet healthcare product started as a single-clinic concept, but the client needed multi-tier franchise operations.

task.zh: 規劃可支援中控總部、連鎖總部、院區三層的商業與技術架構，並預先開發 App 及 Server。
task.en: Plan business and technical architecture for central HQ, franchise HQ, and clinic tiers; pre-build app and server.

zh: 與業務對齊三層權限、資料隔離與營運流程
選型 Flutter + Express/FastAPI + Cloud Run，支援跨平台與彈性部署
App 及 Server 預先開發，TestFlight / Play Console 內測
en: Aligned with business on three-tier permissions, data isolation, and ops flows
Chose Flutter + Express/FastAPI + Cloud Run for cross-platform and flexible deployment
Pre-built app and server; TestFlight / Play Console internal testing

result.zh: 三層商業架構定案，App 與 Server 基礎建設就緒，後續可擴充獸醫端與中控產品。專案進行中。
result.en: Three-tier model approved; app and server foundation ready for vet and admin products. In progress.

title.zh: 獨立完成 LedgerFlow 全端上架

zh: 描述一次獨立完成的專案
你如何平衡正職與 Side Project？
en: Describe a project you completed independently
How do you balance full-time work and side projects?

situation.zh: 個人記帳 App 市場已有許多競品，但多數需手動輸入，帳戶與帳務連動不足。
situation.en: Personal finance apps abound, but most require manual entry with weak account–ledger linking.

task.zh: 獨立完成產品定位、架構、雙平台 App、官網與上架。
task.en: Solo product positioning, architecture, dual-platform app, website, and store launch.

zh: Kotlin + Jetpack Compose（Android）、SwiftUI（iOS）、Realm 本地資料
Next.js 官網 + Firebase Hosting
自行處理 App Store / Google Play 審核與迭代
en: Kotlin + Jetpack Compose (Android), SwiftUI (iOS), Realm local data
Next.js site on Firebase Hosting
Handled App Store / Google Play review and iterations myself

result.zh: Android / iOS 雙平台上架，官網上線；驗證了從產品到交付的完整能力。
result.en: Live on Android and iOS with a public website; validates full product-to-delivery capability.

zh: 描述一次在緊迫時程下交付的經驗
如何取捨功能以準時上線？
en: Tell me about delivering under a tight deadline
How do you scope features to ship on time?

situation.zh: 必盈加密貨幣錢包需在極短時間內雙平台上架，以配合業務窗口。
situation.en: Biying crypto wallet needed a dual-platform launch in weeks to meet a business window.

task.zh: 三週內完成 iOS + Android 上架，且後續需長期維護。
task.en: Ship iOS and Android within three weeks with a codebase maintainable long-term.

zh: 選 React Native 共用邏輯，減少雙端重複開發
與 PM 定義 MVP：核心錢包、轉帳、安全機制優先
每日 stand-up 追蹤阻塞項，必要時我直接補位關鍵模組
en: Chose React Native to share logic across platforms
Defined MVP with PM: core wallet, transfer, security first
Daily stand-ups on blockers; I directly unblocked critical modules when needed

result.zh: 三週內雙平台上架，之後維護三年半。
result.en: Dual-platform launch in three weeks; maintained for 3.5 years.

note.zh: 可誠實談 App 下架，但聚焦從中学到的架構與應變
note.en: Be honest about delisting; focus on architecture and adaptability lessons

question.zh: 為什麼離開上一家公司

note.zh: 赫斯→Megaforce：尋求更完整的產品與 AI 整合機會；現職強調 Product Engineer 定位
note.en: Hearts→Megaforce: sought fuller product and AI integration scope; current role emphasizes Product Engineer identity
